summary: The diff shows only code modifications to backend/main.mo and project_state.json metadata. No deployment configuration changes, infrastructure updates, or deployment scripts are present that would indicate an actual production deployment attempt. The requirement to retry production deployment is not addressed by these changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Retry deploying Version 7 to production environment
missing_requirements.reason: No deployment-related changes are present in the diff. The changes only modify application code (backend/main.mo) and project metadata (project_state.json). A production deployment would require changes to deployment configurations (dfx.json), deployment scripts, canister IDs, network configurations, or evidence of deployment commands being executed.

hallucinated_features.description: Code modifications to backend/main.mo including Product module, cart management logic, and Stripe integration code
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states as a constraint 'Do not modify any existing code or features' and lists 'Modifying existing business logic' as a non-goal. However, the diff shows modifications to backend/main.mo with business logic changes including Product comparison, cart management functions, and authorization checks.
